metadata.description: AAVE V3 AI tools (skills, plugins, agents) for developers and AI agents integrating the AAVE protocol.

skills.name: aave-integration
skills.description: Direct AAVE V3 protocol integration for reading on-chain data and executing transactions

skills.name: aave-planner
skills.description: Position planning and strategy generation for AAVE V3

skills.name: aave-risk-assessor
skills.description: Risk analysis and health factor monitoring for AAVE positions

skills.name: aave-security-foundations
skills.description: Security guidance and audit checklists for AAVE integrations

skills.name: aave-viem-integration
skills.description: EVM blockchain integration using viem for AAVE operations
